title: 桜花賞の後に・重なる、あの日

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I... I did it! I was able to run in the Oka Sho with
everything I got!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Mejiro Dober! Do your best
at the Japanese Oaks too!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! You were so cool! I'll come see you at the
Japanese Oaks for sure!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Watching you run has made me a total fan! I'll
definitely watch your next race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The venue is filled with cheers for Mejiro Dober
after witnessing such a spectacular performance
from the up-and-comer of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: She's done well to win the favor of the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, she's never experienced being under the
scrutiny of so many. How will she react, I
wonder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (E-everyone's looking at me.)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, number eight, Mejiro Dober is rounding the
last turn!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She stumbled and fell after coming out of the
gate, but she hasn't given up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Oh no... This feeling...)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: You're doing your best! Just keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Just a little farther! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (...No. No, no, no, no!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Why are those stupid memories coming back
now?! Things are completely different from back
then!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I ran well today! I finished the race and did
amazing, so why—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's yelling. Their voices, their eyes. Their
eyes are on me. They're looking at me. Their
eyes—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Am I going to have to run amidst all these stares
and voices... forever?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have to run... in all this chaos?

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... gasp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (No, no, no, no! I promised! I promised Bright!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't stop shaking... Stop it! Stop it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I head out to meet Mejiro Dober after her
amazing performance, I notice something's off.
She looks pale and she's trembling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Don't worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's wrong! I'll be able to run in the
Japanese Oaks just fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll run just as well at the Japanese Oaks, so don't
worry about a thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have to! I can't afford to do otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll be perfectly fine... everything's fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is as pale as a ghost... She hardly
even looks at me as she mumbles to herself. She
runs off before I can say anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the Oka Sho, while we're training
for the Japanese Oaks...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is immersing herself fully in her
training, but I can tell something's still off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shadow clouds her expression, and she's
constantly distracted, as though she's trying to
shake off a thought she just can't get rid of.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hello. Apologies for interrupting your training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping I could speak to you for a few
minutes about Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She's been acting strange ever since the Oka Sho,
hasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I might know what Dober is struggling with at the
moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For that reason, I'm afraid I must impose a
request upon you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Would you mind if I spoke with her in private?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
About what she's fighting against. I wish to reveal
its true nature to her, as I don't think she realizes
what it is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, this is ultimately a problem between
you and her. If you don't approve of my
meddling, you are free to decline.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know that something happened at the Oka Sho,
but I have no idea what I should say to make her
feel better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to do whatever I can to support her, and
right now, the best thing to do is ask for help.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Thank you for allowing me to speak
with her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In return, I promise to dispel the vexation you
grip in your fists and honor the sentiment which
you hold for her in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not until Air Groove says that that I finally
realize my hands are curled into tight fists.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't have much time before the Japanese
Oaks. For now, all I can do is hope that Mejiro
Dober will be back to normal in time.
